As a result of their role, Hiss Troopers have access to the heaviest
armor and weaponry from the Bureau's armory, including military
grade chain guns and grenade launchers. In addition to their
already formidable FBC-issued armor, the Hiss resonance
surrounding these entities is dense enough to stop bullets. If
forced to engage one of these, be sure to make use of any
available cover. Also note that, to the telekinetically-talented,
enemy grenades can be a welcome source of ammunition.
Refer to file _for full report.
